content:
🌟 NeoShell | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Remotely managing and controlling a Windows PC from a smartphone or other web-enabled device over a local Wi-Fi network.
✨ Key Features: • Remote PC control via Wi-Fi • Web-based interface • PC locking, sleep, shutdown, reboot • Minimize all windows • Task Manager access
📖 Summary: NeoShell is a Python-based application that allows users to remotely control their Windows PC from a smartphone via Wi-Fi. It provides a web-based interface accessible from any device on the same network, offering features like PC locking, sleep, shutdown, task management, and application launching.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
